title: Graph Neural Network
description: Graph Neural Network documents overview material for Graph Neural Network in the science domain. It is classified as an entity page for the model-family class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights GCNGraph Convolutional Network, GATGraph Attention Network, MPNNMessage Passing Neural Network, GINGraph Isomorphism Network, and . , with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include neural network, graph, gnn, and science, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is science / gnn / overview, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation.
